problem: Traditional cardiac arrhythmia monitoring methods are uncomfortable, have poor patient compliance, and generate low-quality data. Holter monitors are cumbersome and short-term monitoring often misses intermittent arrhythmias, leading to delayed or inaccurate diagnoses and repeated testing.
solution: iRhythm's Zio ECG monitoring patches are easy-to-wear, comfortable long-term continuous cardiac monitors with near-perfect patient compliance. The end-to-end service delivers trustworthy data with exceptional accuracy, enabling accurate arrhythmia diagnoses from the start. Their LTCM (long-term continuous monitoring) service provides the highest diagnostic yield of specified arrhythmias compared to other monitoring services.
